questionHtml:
Ammonium nitrate, NH4NO3, is used as a high nitrogen fertilizer.

A 0.20 mol dm−3 solution of ammonium nitrate is prepared.

Sketch the pH curve that would result from the titration of a 0.20 mol dm−3 solution of ammonium nitrate with sodium hydroxide.
markschemeHtml:
non-symmetrical sigmoidal curve, starting pH 2–7 AND terminating pH>12 ✔

equivalence point pH approximately 11 AND at a volume 20 cm3 ✔

meta.title: Sketch the pH curve that would result from the titration of a 0.20 mol dm−3 solution of ammonium nitrate with sodium hydroxide.
